name: Robot CMM Step Gauge Calibration Scan
description: A quality control engineer must develop an in-line metrology simulation in CoppeliaSim using the ZMQ Remote API. Programmatically construct a 4-step calibration gauge block of adjoining cuboids along the X-axis (starting near X=0.3, Y=0.0) with step dimensions of 0.05m (X) by 0.05m (Y) and heights of 0.02m, 0.04m, 0.06m, and 0.08m. Perform a linear sweep over the block using a downward-pointing ray-type proximity sensor attached to the robot's end-effector to calculate surface heights (surface_z = ee_z - sensor_dist). Export scan_data.csv (containing timestamp, ee_x, ee_y, ee_z, sensor_dist, and surface_z for at least 40 rows) and calibration_metrics.json (containing total_samples, steps_detected, max_surface_z_m, and min_surface_z_m) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/. Save the modified scene as calibration_setup.ttt. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
